narrative:
Rice (precinct in Sandusky County) has 840 registered voters, with 55.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.6 percentage points.
